name: The Basic I-Hate-to-Cook Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup beer and 2 cups buttermilk baking mix in a bowl until it forms a batter that is barely mixed together, without beating it excessively.
2. Grease 8 or 12 muffin tins or cups.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared muffin tins.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 12 minutes.
5. Serve hot with butter and jam.
Note: There will be a few ounces of beer left in the can, but you can use it as desired.
